title: Intro Video
description: Short year-by-year recap video fast, followed by the transition into our graduation ceremony.

title: Graduates Entrance
description: Entrance music plays as graduates enter the stage.

title: National Anthems (Egyptian & French)
description: Listening to the Egyptian and French National Anthems (Hymnes Égyptien et Français).

title: Speech: Dr. Farid Moharam
description: Speech by Dr. Farid Moharam, Dean of the Faculty of Commerce at Ain Shams University.

title: Speech: Dr. Iman
description: Speech by Dr. Iman, Coordinatrice du DGCI auprès d'Ain Shams University.

title: Highest Honors Attestation & Ceremony
description: Attestation Certificate award and ceremony for the 10 Highest Honors recipients.

title: Graduates Speech (Arabic)
description: Delivered by Youhanna Maher & Alain Fady.

title: Memorial Video of DGCI 2026
description: Graduates step down from the stage to watch the official DGCI 2026 memory video.

title: License Certificates Distribution (L3)
description: Graduates step onto the stage, receive their official License certificates, and take their places (58 Graduates).

title: Conclusion & Celebration
description: Closing remarks, music, dancing, hyping, and official group photos.
